description:
Is your common sense really up to the test?

“I know this much.”
“Any adult should know that.”
But even knowledge we feel confident about can sometimes be vague or based on assumptions.

This game is a common sense quiz
based on knowledge useful in everyday life and society.

Word meanings, social rules, and everyday trivia.
Through situations from daily life,
you’ll face quiz questions about general knowledge you think you know.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question  
・Choose an answer by intuition  
・Understand instantly with results and explanations  

Even when you answer correctly, there’s still something to learn.
Even when you get it wrong, you’ll discover something new.

Play from just one question at a time.
Perfect for passing time or refreshing your knowledge.

How far will your common sense take you?
Why not put it to the test?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
